id.description: The ID of the folder in Drive

updated_by.description: The ID of the user who uploaded the file

is_starred.description: This denotes the file is starred or not

files.description: The files associated to the folder

updated_on.description: The date the folder was created

updated_by.description: The ID of the user that created the folder

is_starred.description: This denotes the folder is starred or not

sub_folders.description: The sub folders in the parent

updated_by.description: The ID of the user that created the folder

created_at.description: The date the folder was created

updated_on.description: The date the folder was last updated

is_starred.description: This denotes the folder is starred or not

sub_folders.description: Sub folders of the media folder

extension_data.description: Extension data for customer API response

success.description: Indicates the status of the API response. A value of true signifies that the request was successfully processed, while false indicates a failure or error occurred.

extension_data.description: This is the Extension data object

stack_trace.description: A technical trace showing where the error occurred within the system. Intended for backend debugging.

description.description: A clear message explaining what caused the error. This helps quickly understand what went wrong.

error_code.description: A short, predefined code that identifies the type of error. Useful for logging the error or raising a support request.

custom_data.description: Any structured metadata for the error object.

errors.description: A list of errors encountered during the API request. Each error object provides details about the problem, including an error code and a message explaining the issue. This field is populated when the request fails or encounters issues.

extension_data.description: Extension Data for customer Api warning

description.description: A plain message that describes the warning and helps understand what should be reviewed.

warning_code.description: A short, predefined code that uniquely identifies the warning type.

warnings.description: A list of warnings generated during the API request. These are non-critical issues or recommendations that might affect the request but won't stop it from processing. Each warning object provides a message to inform the user of potential problems.

extension_data.description: Extension data for customer Api response information

description.description: A plain message offering helpful context about the response, such as confirmation of fallback logic or skipped operations.

information.description: Contains additional non-critical information relevant to the request or response. This field provides extra details that might assist in understanding the context of the API response but is not essential for processing.

Success status response.summary: Here, you can verify the folder’s information using the folder ID.
